## Project Structure
- Next.js 14 with TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Supabase for database
- Components: LandingPage, WorkoutForm, AdminDashboard
- Types and utilities configured
- PDF generation ready
- Admin dashboard with Kanban

## Completed Steps
- [x] Created complete project scaffold with all directories
- [x] Generated all configuration files
- [x] Created 3 core React components (Landing, Form, Admin)
- [x] Created 3 Next.js routes (/, /formulario, /admin)
- [x] Set up Supabase integration and database utilities
- [x] Set up PDF generation utilities (jsPDF)
- [x] Created 6 comprehensive documentation files
- [x] Database schema ready (SQL provided)
- [x] Environment config template created
- [x] Project is 100% ready for setup

## What's Ready to Use
- Landing page with CTA
- Multi-step form (5 steps) with progress display
- Admin Kanban dashboard for 4 status columns
- Supabase database integration
- TypeScript types for all data models
- PDF generation for training plans
- Tailwind CSS styling with custom colors
- Environment variables template

## Next Steps for User
1. Run: npm install
2. Create Supabase project
3. Execute database.sql in Supabase
4. Fill .env.local with Supabase credentials
5. Run: npm run dev
6. Test at http://localhost:3000

## Documentation Files
- COMECE_AQUI.md - Start here (Quick start guide)
- README.md - Project overview
- SETUP.md - Detailed setup instructions
- CUSTOMIZATION.md - How to customize (colors, texts, integrations)
- ARCHITECTURE.md - Project structure and architecture
- CHECKLIST.md - Implementation checklist
- database.sql - Database schema SQL
